CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Syntax: condition ? 'style1' : 'style2' Examples:
value == 'Active' ? 'color: green;' : 'color: red;'
value > 0 ? 'color: green;' : 'color: red;'
value >= 1 && value <= 5 ? 'background-color: yellow;' : ''
value == true ? 'background-color: lightblue;' : 'background-color: gray;'
Supported CSS styles:
color, background-color
font-weight, font-style
text-align, border, padding
CustomField.label: Conditional Formatting
